08],[357,515,1776531132418],[342,515,1776531132433],[330,515,1776531132444],[319,515,1776531132458],[311,515,1776531132470],[305,515,1776531132485],[302,515,1776531132500],[300,515,1776531132519],[299,515,1776531132533],[298,515,1776531132540],[297,514,1776531132557],[296,514,1776531132568],[295,514,1776531132577],[294,514,1776531132594],[293,514,1776531132605],[293,513,1776531132621],[293,512,1776531132632],[293,511,1776531132641],[293,510,1776531132654],[293,509,1776531132668],[293,507,1776531132683],[293,506,1776531132696],[293,504,1776531132701],[294,502,1776531132725],[293,502,1776531132734],[293,503,1776531132740],[293,504,1776531132759],[293,505,1776531132783],[292,506,1776531132795],[292,507,1776531132812],[291,508,1776531132822],[290,509,1776531132830],[290,510,1776531132839],[289,511,1776531132844],[289,512,1776531132860]],"mm-mp":16.872682323856612,"md":[[358,419,1776531125050],[299,461,1776531126857],[294,515,1776531132608]],"md-mp":2947.5,"mu":[[358,419,1776531125113],[299,461,1776531126921],[294,515,1776531132768]],"mu-mp":2968.5},"v":1,"tc":{}}
